Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Northstrider]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Northstrider is a man with glowing golden eyes and muscles who consumes sacred beasts in the deepest places of the world.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Northstrider is a dragon-eater and a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Northstrider is a powerful person who reportedly died almost seven years ago.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider is a Monarch who created Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider abandoned Ghostwater almost fifty years before his death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Northstrider built a pocket world to find a way to enhance his mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Northstrider withdrew his presence and protection from Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Northstrider is a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Northstrider has personal quarters in the facility.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Scholars theorized creating a super-spirit of Dreamseeds to handle thoughts for Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Northstrider built a pocket world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Northstrider scattered over four thousand memory storage constructs across the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Northstrider instructed that returning the Eye of the Deep to the tree allows one to ask one question and receive one drop of ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Northstrider left soulfire stored at the base of the basin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Northstrider created a collective mind that failed because it lacked initiative and creativity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Northstrider is a Monarch on the Path of the Hungry Deep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Northstrider possesses Eyes of the Deep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Northstrider possesses a smooth black orb construct that acts as an advanced version of the Eyes of the Deep.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Northstrider attempted to develop transportation gates to Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Northstrider's work helped Lindon get ahead of schedule.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Northstrider is the Monarch of unbound sacred artists.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider is associated with Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Northstrider is a great Monarch who lost his life in battle against the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Northstrider stepped out of a ragged, blue-edged hole in midair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Northstrider has golden eyes with vertical slits like gold dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Northstrider has black scales covering his hands up to his elbows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Northstrider has declared that contestants will fight under his protection and according to his will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Northstrider is smart enough to potentially pull Dross out of Lindon's brain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Northstrider commands the start of the competition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Northstrider is one of the youngest Archlords ever.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Northstrider's protection is in effect during the tournament rounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Northstrider announced the Akura team as the victor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Northstrider appears in the middle of the arena standing on a high rectangular pillar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Northstrider is located atop a maze.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Northstrider commanded the match to begin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Northstrider surveyed sixteen young Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Northstrider is a person deciding matchups in the competition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Northstrider is a Monarch and the patron of the Uncrowned tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Northstrider has a Monarch viewing platform located at a ball of dark, floating water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Northstrider used his power to carry competitors forward through the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon resents Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Northstrider pitted Yerin and Lindon against each other.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Northstrider is a wandering Monarch of the Trackless Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Northstrider was born with a connection to blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Northstrider stands above a dark globe of water.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider is a Monarch with golden eyes and black-scaled hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider is the greatest enemy of the dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider opened a portal that led onto a steeply sloped roof tiled in rose-tinted crystal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider's eyes gleamed gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider is a master.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider follows the Path of the Hungry Deep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider consumed sacred beasts in the deepest places in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider is a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider has red-scaled fists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider uses Enforced punches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider fights using blood aura and living techniques shaped like red dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider manifests a Remnant made mostly of blood madra with red curling horns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider's Remnant has the eyes of a gold dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider possesses hunger madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider provides protection to Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Northstrider announced that Yerin and Mercy were going to fight each other.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel is a chosen of Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Northstrider stands between the competitors during the match.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Northstrider pits Yan Shoumei against Blacksword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel represents Northstrider in the Uncrowned tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Northstrider is a huge muscular man with golden eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel is the representative of Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Northstrider used a spirit Enforcer technique while processing cycled powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Northstrider has borrowed Dross twice in the last five days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Herald of the green dragons holds a centuries-old grudge against Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Northstrider is a Monarch whom Min Shuei appealed to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Northstrider has a draconic gaze.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Northstrider announced the rematch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Northstrider has the ability to restore people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Northstrider can heal minds as well as bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Northstrider asked if Yerin and Calan were ready.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Northstrider spoke to the group about dragon strategy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Northstrider provided a ceramic tile with a script on it as a gift.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Northstrider resents being summoned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Northstrider is a Monarch who stands in the center of the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Ruby's scraps would take weeks to recover without Northstrider’s restoration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Northstrider restored Yerin's body and spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider emphasized discovering common ground between Lindon's three madra types.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider consumes madra from the Dreadgods to help determine when they will wake up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon possesses Northstrider’s hunger madra technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Northstrider can restore the Moonlight Bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Northstrider makes announcements to start fights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Ruby questions if Northstrider can split her and Yerin up again.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Northstrider uses blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Northstrider possesses an oracle codex in his soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Northstrider has an experimental Presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Northstrider has clashed with Reigan Shen many times.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Northstrider unleashed a shield with a binding covering a square mile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Northstrider commanded someone to stay.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Northstrider has brought back the dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Northstrider is a champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Northstrider's emblem is a red dragon head with golden eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Northstrider can use blood and force aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Northstrider can draw streams of blood into vials using aura and a thought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Northstrider possesses a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Northstrider understands the nature of hunger madra better than anyone else alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Northstrider can push through the Way to travel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Northstrider slammed his fist into the Dreadgod's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Northstrider used a serpentine dragon of scarlet madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Northstrider moved toward the Wandering Titan in a vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Northstrider is recovering his spirit in midair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Northstrider is categorizing how much strength the battle with the Phoenix cost him.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider is a Tidewalker Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider can rouse and direct the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon hoped Northstrider would contact him regarding Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Malice can call upon Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Master Northstrider's subordinates studied dreadbeasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Master Northstrider can copy the wills of those he devours into his techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Northstrider is familiar with the labyrinth's functions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Northstrider was watching the Dreadgod from far away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Northstrider possesses a codex with a reflective black surface.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Northstrider left an echo of himself in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider possesses a cloud fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider uses an oracle codex for information and predictions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider can use spiritual perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon saw an image of Northstrider in battle with the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Northstrider discovered the completed version of the Grand Oath Array at least two hundred years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Northstrider is mentioned as someone who did not deign to help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Northstrider has resources to reverse-engineer Books.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Northstrider is trailing a red dragon of blood and hunger madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Northstrider crashes from high above during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Northstrider can pull constructs from a void space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Northstrider focused on Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Northstrider's hands were black-scaled and shone with blood and hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Northstrider's punch was layered with an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Northstrider matched a blow from Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Northstrider has high-value projects in his personal void space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Northstrider is a Monarch who was expected at the meeting with Sha Miara.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider's authority is physical.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider's halls are larger than the current pocket world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Northstrider does not seem to need a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Northstrider emerged from the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Northstrider held out a palm during the attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Northstrider punched with an explosion of air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Northstrider forged a defensive layer of bloody madra around himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Northstrider possesses the authority of the Strength Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Northstrider set up barriers around Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — A serpentine dragon was forged from Northstrider's madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Northstrider is trading techniques with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Northstrider is content to lock Lindon in place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Northstrider fought off an echo of himself and three other Heralds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Northstrider possesses a Dreadgod weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Northstrider possesses a limb from the Slumbering Wraith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Northstrider sent Striker techniques after Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Northstrider was blasted into the earth by a black dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Northstrider's Consume was used to help create Yerin's hunger technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Northstrider's power was thrashing inside Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon can push Northstrider’s power through a bond to Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon delivered a blow worthy of Northstrider onto the Weeping Dragon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider's current headquarters is the Sunken Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider has a fortress that serves as the current seat of his power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider's authority cannot be surpassed within his fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider has a simple gray room on the thirtieth floor of his fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider was tutored by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider used spiritual perception to envelop the world for hundreds of miles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider locked the entrance to Emriss's prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider's eyes are not golden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider intended to gather power to force the Abidan to remove the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider's willpower is that of a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider asks Lindon for a word that he won't attack while his guard is down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider attempted to destroy an echo of his past self.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider possesses a Consume technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider is afraid to ascend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider's Consume technique causes a rush of white and gray to flood into him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider does not have an established sect or clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider intends to make a clean break.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider sends instructions to Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider has experience manipulating the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon forced Northstrider to advance.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider has a black-scaled hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider possesses an oracle codex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider uses blood and hunger madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider's techniques were reduced in collateral damage by the stability of Sanctum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider has an oracle codex and a connection to multiple Icons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider has sensed the echo of the Strength Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider has evolved his perception from that of a Monarch since ascending.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider has a gift for working with time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider has made many dragons part of himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider's body is perfect and unassailable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider's curiosity resonates with hunger madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider uses wind aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider possesses spiritual perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Northstrider's body was broken and twisted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Northstrider's authority can heal Lindon.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
